name: Impossible Ratatouille Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400 degrees F.
2. Grease a pie plate lightly.
3. Cook zucchini, eggplant, tomato, green pepper, onion, and garlic in margarine until vegetables are crisp-tender (5-10 minutes).
4. Stir in seasonings.
5. Spread mixture in pie plate and sprinkle with cheese.
6. Beat remaining ingredients in a blender on high or with a hand beater for 1 minute until smooth.
7. Pour the batter into the pie plate.
8. Bake until a knife inserted comes out clean, about 30-35 minutes.
9. Allow to stand for 5 minutes before serving.
10. Makes 4-6 servings.
